message:
feat(core,abi,membrane): optimize pthread, implement IO natives, harden dlfcn, widen generation counters

Threading Improvements:
- Add ThreadHandle magic field (0x5448_444c) for runtime validity checking
- Implement handle_for_tid() for O(1) TLS-based thread lookup replacing
  O(n) registry scan in pthread_self
- Simplify pthread_join self-detection via direct pointer comparison
- Improve detached thread lifecycle by deferring registry cleanup

IO Completeness:
- Implement native _IO_getc, _IO_putc, _IO_feof, _IO_ferror, _IO_fileno,
  _IO_peekc_locked for peek+unget patterns
- Native _IO_gets with HARDENED 16 MiB limit to prevent overflow
- Rewrite _IO_file_overflow for correct buffer flushing + char output
- Fix global symbol resolution atomicity via compare_exchange

Security Hardening:
- Harden dlfcn error state with dual thread-local buffers (PENDING/STABLE)
  to prevent use-after-free of host dlerror strings
- Make set_dlerror_raw() unsafe with deep string copy
- Implement dlvsym() for versioned symbol lookup (GNU extension)
- Add printf %m format specifier support via strerror_r

Temporal Safety:
- Widen AllocationFingerprint.generation from u32 to u64 (20→24 bytes)
- Sync PointerAbstraction.generation type in galois module

Code Quality:
- Consolidate stdlib handler lock unwrapping to unwrap_or_else pattern
- Add defensive null checks in unistd utilities (ftw, nftw, fts_read)
- Simplify optional bounds checking with is_some_and combinators
- Cleaner early-return patterns in stdlib and unistd modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
